requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — EAC / GOST / IEC 62368-1 for 220 V / 50 Hz European-Plug Grid (Type C/F)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——针对220V/50Hz欧标插头（C/F型）电网的EAC / GOST / IEC 62368-1
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——針對220V/50Hz歐標插頭（C/F型）電網的EAC / GOST / IEC 62368-1

summary.en: Kazakhstan operates on a 220 V / 50 Hz electrical grid and uses Type C and Type F (Schuko-compatible) plugs — the European and Soviet-legacy standard. Electrical safety for electronic and electrical equipment placed on the EAEU market (including Kazakhstan) is governed by TR EAEU 004/2011 'On the safety of low-voltage equipment'. Wireless and IoT consumer devices with mains-connected power supplies are within scope. The applicable safety standard under TR EAEU 004/2011 for audio/video, IT and communication technology equipment is GOST IEC 62368-1 (the EAEU adoption of IEC 62368-1), which has superseded GOST IEC 60950-1. Conformity assessment requires testing by a KazInMetr-accredited or EAEU-accredited safety laboratory and certification by an accredited EAEU conformity assessment body. Chinese products designed for 220 V may have a voltage compatibility advantage, but the plug type (Type A/C in China vs. Type C/F in Kazakhstan) and the certification framework are different and require separate assessment.
summary.zh: 哈萨克斯坦使用220V/50Hz电网，采用C型和F型（Schuko兼容）插头——即欧洲及苏联传统标准。投放EAEU市场（含哈萨克斯坦）的电气和电子设备的电气安全受TR EAEU 004/2011《低压设备安全》约束。带有市电连接电源的无线及消费类物联网设备在适用范围内。TR EAEU 004/2011下适用于音视频、IT及通信技术设备的安全标准为GOST IEC 62368-1（IEC 62368-1的EAEU版本），已取代GOST IEC 60950-1。合格评定须由KazInMetr认可或EAEU认可的安全实验室进行测试，并由经认可的EAEU合格评定机构颁发证书。为220V设计的中国产品可能具有电压兼容优势，但插头类型（中国为A/C型，哈萨克斯坦为C/F型）和认证框架不同，须进行独立评定。
summary.zht: 哈薩克斯坦使用220V/50Hz電網，採用C型和F型（Schuko相容）插頭——即歐洲及蘇聯傳統標準。投放EAEU市場（含哈薩克斯坦）的電氣和電子設備的電氣安全受TR EAEU 004/2011《低壓設備安全》約束。帶有市電連接電源的無線及消費類物聯網設備在適用範圍內。TR EAEU 004/2011下適用於音視頻、IT及通信技術設備的安全標準為GOST IEC 62368-1（IEC 62368-1的EAEU版本），已取代GOST IEC 60950-1。合格評定須由KazInMetr認可或EAEU認可的安全實驗室進行測試，並由經認可的EAEU合格評定機構頒發證書。為220V設計的中國產品可能具有電壓相容優勢，但插頭類型（中國為A/C型，哈薩克斯坦為C/F型）和認證框架不同，須進行獨立評定。

standards_or_laws: TR EAEU 004/2011 — Technical Regulation of the Eurasian Economic Union 'On the safety of low-voltage equipment' (Decision of the CU Commission No. 798, 16 August 2011)
GOST IEC 62368-1 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Part 1: Safety requirements (EAEU adoption of IEC 62368-1)
Kazakhstan grid: 220 V / 50 Hz; Plug type C (Europlug) and F (Schuko) — CEE 7/4 and CEE 7/5

summary.en: China's mandatory electrical safety standard for information technology equipment is GB 4943.1 (aligned with IEC 60950-1), enforced through CCC certification. A newer standard GB/T 42315 (aligned with IEC 62368-1) has been published. China uses a 220 V / 50 Hz grid (compatible with Kazakhstan's voltage) but uses Type A and Type I plugs (distinct from Kazakhstan's Type C/F). CCC electrical safety certification to GB 4943.1 does not substitute for EAEU TR EAEU 004/2011 conformity under GOST IEC 62368-1. Chinese plug-form products may require an adapter or plug change for the Kazakhstan Type C/F market.
summary.zh: 中国信息技术设备的强制性电气安全标准为GB 4943.1（与IEC 60950-1接轨），通过CCC认证执行。更新版标准GB/T 42315（与IEC 62368-1接轨）已发布。中国使用220V/50Hz电网（与哈萨克斯坦电压兼容），但使用A型和I型插头（与哈萨克斯坦的C/F型不同）。基于GB 4943.1的CCC电气安全认证不可替代GOST IEC 62368-1下的EAEU TR EAEU 004/2011合格评定。中国插头规格的产品可能需要适配器或更换插头以适应哈萨克斯坦C/F型市场。
summary.zht: 中國信息技術設備的強制性電氣安全標準為GB 4943.1（與IEC 60950-1接軌），通過CCC認證執行。更新版標準GB/T 42315（與IEC 62368-1接軌）已發布。中國使用220V/50Hz電網（與哈薩克斯坦電壓相容），但使用A型和I型插頭（與哈薩克斯坦的C/F型不同）。基於GB 4943.1的CCC電氣安全認證不可替代GOST IEC 62368-1下的EAEU TR EAEU 004/2011合格評定。中國插頭規格的產品可能需要適配器或更換插頭以適應哈薩克斯坦C/F型市場。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Safety of information technology equipment — Part 1: General requirements (CCC mandatory, aligned with IEC 60950-1)
GB/T 42315 — Safety requirements for audio/video, information and communication technology equipment (aligned with IEC 62368-1, adoption timeline to be verified with CNCA)
China grid: 220 V / 50 Hz; Plug type A (flat two-pin) and I (oblique flat three-pin)

gap.en: Chinese CCC electrical safety certification (GB 4943.1) does not substitute for EAEU TR EAEU 004/2011 conformity under GOST IEC 62368-1. While China and Kazakhstan both use 220 V / 50 Hz, the plug standard differs (Type A/I in China; Type C/F in Kazakhstan), requiring product adaptation. The conformity assessment must be conducted under the EAEU framework by a KazInMetr-accredited or EAEU-accredited safety laboratory. An EAC certificate covering TR EAEU 004/2011 must be obtained. Products must display the EAC mark covering all applicable EAEU technical regulations (TR EAEU 004/2011 safety, TR EAEU 037/2016 radio, TR CU 020/2011 EMC). The shift from GOST IEC 60950-1 to GOST IEC 62368-1 mirrors the global transition from IEC 60950-1 to IEC 62368-1, but new test reports to the EAEU version are required regardless of prior testing.
gap.zh: 中国CCC电气安全认证（GB 4943.1）不可替代GOST IEC 62368-1下的EAEU TR EAEU 004/2011合格评定。尽管中国和哈萨克斯坦均使用220V/50Hz，但插头标准不同（中国为A/I型，哈萨克斯坦为C/F型），需对产品进行适配。合格评定须在EAEU框架内由KazInMetr认可或EAEU认可的安全实验室开展。须取得涵盖TR EAEU 004/2011的EAC证书。产品须贴附覆盖所有适用EAEU技术法规（TR EAEU 004/2011安全、TR EAEU 037/2016无线电、TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容）的EAC标志。从GOST IEC 60950-1到GOST IEC 62368-1的转变与全球从IEC 60950-1向IEC 62368-1的过渡一致，但无论先前是否已进行测试，均须提交针对EAEU版本的新测试报告。
gap.zht: 中國CCC電氣安全認證（GB 4943.1）不可替代GOST IEC 62368-1下的EAEU TR EAEU 004/2011合格評定。儘管中國和哈薩克斯坦均使用220V/50Hz，但插頭標準不同（中國為A/I型，哈薩克斯坦為C/F型），需對產品進行適配。合格評定須在EAEU框架內由KazInMetr認可或EAEU認可的安全實驗室開展。須取得涵蓋TR EAEU 004/2011的EAC證書。產品須貼附覆蓋所有適用EAEU技術法規（TR EAEU 004/2011安全、TR EAEU 037/2016無線電、TR CU 020/2011電磁相容）的EAC標誌。從GOST IEC 60950-1到GOST IEC 62368-1的轉變與全球從IEC 60950-1向IEC 62368-1的過渡一致，但無論先前是否已進行測試，均須提交針對EAEU版本的新測試報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EAC conformity under TR EAEU 004/2011 (GOST IEC 62368-1) required for mains-powered wireless and IoT devices sold in Kazakhstan and the EAEU
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification to GB 4943.1 required for in-scope IT and AV equipment sold in China

source.publisher: Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC) — Decision of the CU Commission No. 798

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EAC conformity under TR EAEU 004/2011 (electrical safety, GOST IEC 62368-1) is mandatory for mains-powered wireless and IoT devices sold in Kazakhstan. Chinese CCC / GB 4943.1 certification does not substitute. Products must also adapt plug configuration from Chinese Type A/I to Kazakhstan Type C/F. Combined EAC marking covering safety, radio, and EMC technical regulations is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] TR EAEU 004/2011（电气安全，GOST IEC 62368-1）下的EAC合格标志对所有在哈萨克斯坦销售的市电供电无线及物联网设备为强制要求。中国CCC / GB 4943.1认证不可替代。产品还须将插头配置从中国A/I型适配为哈萨克斯坦C/F型。须取得涵盖安全、无线电及电磁兼容技术法规的组合EAC标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] TR EAEU 004/2011（電氣安全，GOST IEC 62368-1）下的EAC合格標誌對所有在哈薩克斯坦銷售的市電供電無線及物聯網設備為強制要求。中國CCC / GB 4943.1認證不可替代。產品還須將插頭配置從中國A/I型適配為哈薩克斯坦C/F型。須取得涵蓋安全、無線電及電磁相容技術法規的組合EAC標誌。
